title: lithocarpus kuarunensis
intro: Lithocarpus kuarunensis, also known as Kuarun copper beech, is a species of deciduous tree in the beech family Fagaceae, native to China. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its bark, which is used to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and rheumatism. The health benefits of Lithocarpus kuarunensis include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to act as a natural anticoagulant. Traditionally, the bark and leaves of Lithocarpus kuarunensis are prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions to utilize its medicinal properties.
